tools.name: amberflo_list_customers
tools.description: List all customers registered in your Amberflo account (id, name, email, traits, enabled). Good first call to discover customer ids. API: GET /customers/.

tools.name: amberflo_get_customer
tools.description: Fetch a single customer by its Amberflo customerId. API: GET /customers/?customerId=<id>.

tools.name: amberflo_list_meters
tools.description: List all meter definitions in your account (id, meterApiName, label, meterType, aggregation, etc.). Use meterApiName values here as inputs to usage tools. API: GET /meters.

tools.name: amberflo_get_usage
tools.description: Query aggregated usage for a single meter over a time range, optionally grouped/filtered. API: POST /usage/.

tools.name: amberflo_get_all_usage
tools.description: Get total usage across all meters over a time range, optionally grouped by customer or filtered to one customer. API: GET /usage/all.

tools.name: amberflo_explain_usage
tools.description: Explain/drill into the raw meter events behind a meter's usage over a time range — useful to debug why a number looks off. API: POST /usage/explain.

tools.name: amberflo_get_customer_plan
tools.description: Get a customer's LATEST assigned product plan (pricing). API: GET /payments/pricing/amberflo/customer-pricing?CustomerId=<id>.

tools.name: amberflo_list_customer_plan_history
tools.description: List the full history of product plans assigned to a customer over time. API: GET /payments/pricing/amberflo/customer-pricing/list?CustomerId=<id>.

tools.name: amberflo_list_customer_invoices
tools.description: List all invoices for a customer (optionally for a specific product), with payment status. API: GET /payments/billing/customer-product-invoice/all.

tools.name: amberflo_get_customer_invoice
tools.description: Get a single customer invoice: the CURRENT open invoice (latest=true, default) or a SPECIFIC past invoice by product_plan_id + year + month + day. API: GET /payments/billing/customer-product-invoice.

tools.name: amberflo_list_prepaid_orders
tools.description: List a customer's active prepaid credit orders for a product. API: GET /payments/pricing/amberflo/customer-prepaid/list?CustomerId=<id>&ProductId=<pid>.

tools.name: amberflo_create_customer
tools.description: WRITE: create/register a new customer in Amberflo (id + name required; optional email, enabled flag, and traits). Optionally auto-create the customer in Stripe. API: POST /customers/.

tools.name: amberflo_assign_customer_plan
tools.description: WRITE: assign/attach a pricing product plan to a customer — this changes what the customer is billed. API: POST /payments/pricing/amberflo/customer-pricing.

tools.name: amberflo_ingest_usage
tools.description: WRITE: record/ingest a single usage meter event (writes billable usage data) to the Amberflo ingestion host. API: POST /ingest/ on the ingest base URL.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: amberflo_list_customers, amberflo_get_usage · Private data: amberflo_ingest_usage · Public sink: amberflo_list_customers, amberflo_get_usage, amberflo_explain_usage, amberflo_create_customer, amberflo_assign_customer_plan, amberflo_ingest_usage.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: amberflo_list_customers, amberflo_get_usage · Private data: amberflo_ingest_usage · Public sink: amberflo_list_customers, amberflo_get_usage, amberflo_explain_usage, amberflo_create_customer, amberflo_assign_customer_plan, amberflo_ingest_usage

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
